question: Why did days-payable-outstanding extend 9 days for tier-2 suppliers in the EMEA business unit last quarter while NA held?
metric_label: DPO by supplier tier and business unit, quarterly

upstream_models.description: AP invoices from SAP BSEG and BKPF via Fivetran CDC. Includes invoice_date, due_date, payment_date, amount_eur, company_code, and routing_status.
Purchase orders from SAP EKKO and EKPO. Includes vendor_id, po_date, goods_receipt_date, business_unit, and payment_terms.
Vendor master from SAP LFA1. Carries supplier_tier classification (tier-1, tier-2, tier-3), country, and payment_group assignments used to segment the DPO calculation.
FI document header from SAP BKPF. Includes company_code, fiscal_period, fiscal_year, and posting_date — the anchors for the quarterly DPO roll-up.
